rdw.source: Elevated RDW can indicate increased red blood cell production variability, which can be seen in psoriasis.

hgb.source: Anemia (low Hgb) is common in psoriasis due to chronic inflammation and potential iron deficiency.

hct.source: Low Hct is associated with anemia, a frequent finding in psoriasis.

wbc.source: Elevated WBC count can indicate inflammation, which is a hallmark of psoriasis.

plt.source: Elevated platelet count (thrombocytosis) can be seen in psoriasis due to inflammation.

mcv.source: Low MCV (microcytosis) can be associated with iron deficiency anemia, a potential complication of psoriasis.

mch.source: Low MCH (mean corpuscular hemoglobin) can be seen in iron deficiency anemia, a potential complication of psoriasis.

mchc.source: Low MCHc (mean corpuscular hemoglobin concentration) can be seen in iron deficiency anemia, a potential complication of psoriasis.

rbc.source: Low RBC count is associated with anemia, a frequent finding in psoriasis.
